# Soraia Designs

> Soraia Designs helps short-term rental investors improve booking performance through strategy-first interior design, sourcing, and procurement.

## Key pages
- https://www.soraiadesigns.com/
- https://www.soraiadesigns.com/audit
- https://www.soraiadesigns.com/audit/get-started

## Services
- STR design strategy
- Full interior design for short-term rentals
- Furniture, decor, and procurement support

## Audience
- Short-term rental investors
- Airbnb and vacation-rental owners
- Portfolio operators who want higher ADR, stronger listing differentiation, and better guest reviews

## Location
- Based in Tampa Bay, Florida
- Serves Tampa, St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Bradenton, Sarasota, and select remote clients

## Proof points
- Strategy-first positioning
- Audit funnel for short-term rental design/conversion reviews
- Projects start at $5,000

## Contact
- https://www.soraiadesigns.com/
- soraia@soraiadesigns.com
